name: sorex-code
description: Your AI coding assistant. Use your own local LLM or OpenAI-compatible endpoint to chat, search, and edit code with SOREX Code.

sorex.endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible local model endpoint. LM Studio default is http://localhost:1234/v1.

sorex.model.description: Selected model id. Leave blank to show Select model in the SOREX chat view.

sorex.maxInputTokens.description: Maximum input tokens SOREX assumes for budgeting.

sorex.useProviderContext.description: Use the selected provider/model reported context window when available. Falls back to sorex.maxInputTokens if unavailable.

sorex.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens requested from the model.

sorex.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for local model calls.

sorex.compactAtPercent.description: Approximate context percent where SOREX auto-compacts conversation history.

sorex.autoCompactEnabled.description: Automatically compact conversation history when the context trigger is reached.

sorex.maxUserMessageChars.description: Maximum characters allowed in a single user message before SOREX rejects it instead of poisoning the context window.

sorex.providerMode.description: Provider mode. Local/OpenAI-compatible endpoints work now; cloud APIs require their official API keys.

sorex.openaiEndpoint.description: OpenAI API endpoint used when Provider is OpenAI.

sorex.openaiModel.description: OpenAI model id used when Provider is OpenAI.

sorex.anthropicEndpoint.description: Anthropic API endpoint used when Provider is Anthropic.

sorex.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model id used when Provider is Anthropic.

sorex.googleEndpoint.description: Google Gemini OpenAI-compatible endpoint used when Provider is Google.

sorex.googleModel.description: Google Gemini model id used when Provider is Google.

sorex.openrouterEndpoint.description: OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible endpoint used when Provider is OpenRouter.

sorex.openrouterModel.description: OpenRouter model id used when Provider is OpenRouter.

sorex.preferLocalModels.description: Show local LM Studio models before cloud/provider options.

sorex.cloudApiKeyStorage.description: Reserved cloud API key storage mode. SOREX does not use ChatGPT subscription login as an API key.

sorex.maxToolRounds.description: Maximum model/tool loop rounds per request before SOREX stops for safety.

sorex.nativeToolCallingEnabled.description: Use native provider tool calling when SOREX thinks the selected model supports it. When disabled, SOREX uses text tool-call fallback parsing.

sorex.conservativeToolCalling.description: Use fewer automatic tool calls and pause earlier during broad searches.

sorex.indexEnabled.description: Enable SOREX workspace indexing for faster codebase recall.

sorex.indexAutoRefresh.description: Automatically refresh the workspace index when stale or when settings change.

sorex.indexStorageMode.description: Workspace index storage type. Default folder-json stores .ai-index/manifest.json, chunks.json, and vectors.json when embeddings are enabled.

sorex.indexRankingMode.description: Search ranking mode for workspace_index_search. Hybrid combines lexical and embedding vectors when available.

sorex.indexEmbeddingProvider.description: Provider used for SOREX index embeddings. Active uses the selected chat provider endpoint when compatible.

sorex.indexEmbeddingAutoSelect.description: Automatically select a detected embedding model for the selected embedding provider when no model is set.

sorex.indexIncludeGlobs.description: Glob pattern included in SOREX workspace indexing. Blank uses SOREX built-in source-file defaults.

sorex.indexExcludeGlobs.description: Glob pattern excluded from SOREX workspace indexing. Blank uses SOREX built-in generated-folder exclusions.

sorex.indexMaxFiles.description: Maximum files SOREX indexes per workspace. SOREX stores results in .ai-index and reuses unchanged files on rebuild.

sorex.indexMaxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum individual file size included in SOREX indexing.

sorex.indexChunkOverlap.description: Approximate overlap characters between adjacent indexed chunks.

sorex.indexMaxResults.description: Default maximum results returned from workspace_index_search.

sorex.indexStaleMs.description: Milliseconds before SOREX considers the workspace index stale.

sorex.indexEmbeddingEnabled.description: Use the configured provider embedding endpoint to add semantic vectors to the SOREX workspace index. Falls back to lexical indexing if unavailable.

sorex.indexEmbeddingEndpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint base URL. Blank uses the active provider endpoint.

sorex.indexEmbeddingModel.description: Embedding model id used for SOREX workspace indexing. Example: text-embedding-nomic-embed-text-v1.5.

sorex.indexEmbeddingBatchSize.description: Number of chunks per embedding request during indexing.

sorex.indexEmbeddingWeight.description: Semantic similarity weight mixed into workspace_index_search ranking.

sorex.includeToolSchemaInContextBudget.description: Include discounted tool schema overhead in SOREX context budget calculations.

sorex.contextSafetyTokens.description: Safety reserve used when estimating tool-capable context budget.

sorex.webSearchMaxResults.description: Number of DuckDuckGo HTML search results returned by web_search.

sorex.toolEditFilesEnabled.description: Enable file mutation tools such as replace, insert, write, delete, and create directory.
